description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find any wedding DJ package that includes dance floor lighting, runs at least 4 hours, and costs no more than $1,200, then submit a booking request for an evening reception in September this year.

booking_form.message_text: Please confirm availability for this 4-hour wedding package with lighting under $1,200.

tasks.instruction: Find a group beginner salsa class held on Thursdays that starts after 6:00 PM and costs $30 or less per class, then submit a registration interest form for one person starting in mid-April.

registration_form.message_text: Interested in the Thursday beginner salsa class after 6 PM for one person.

tasks.instruction: Choose a hip-hop performance video from the gallery that is at least 3 minutes long, copy its link, and include that link in a private lesson request saying you want to learn its choreography.

lesson_request_form.name: Jordan Lee
lesson_request_form.message_text: Hip-hop video link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hiphop210 I would like a private lesson to learn the choreography from this hip-hop performance.

tasks.instruction: Customize a 3-hour birthday DJ package priced under $600 by adding lighting and microphone add-ons while keeping the total at or below $800, then send a quote request for a 30th birthday party later this year.

quote_request_form.name: Taylor Morgan
quote_request_form.notes: Please send a quote for this customized birthday package under $800.

tasks.instruction: Filter testimonials to corporate events, open the highest-rated one, and then submit a corporate DJ booking inquiry that mentions you found them through that company's testimonial.

target_names: Perfect blend of professional and fun

booking_form.message_text: I found you through the testimonial from Lone Star Tech Solutions and would like a similar corporate DJ and dance instruction package.

tasks.instruction: Read the travel policy about how many miles are included and any per-mile fees, then use the contact form to ask about DJ travel costs for an event in Dallas, TX that is about 200 miles from Austin.

target_names: How far do you travel for events?

contact_form.name: Chris Nguyen
contact_form.message_text: I saw that standard travel covers up to 50 miles with an extra fee per mile beyond that. My event is in Dallas, roughly 200 miles away. Please let me know the total travel fee.

tasks.instruction: Open the newsletter signup, select only the topics for wedding DJ tips and Latin dance tutorials, choose a monthly email frequency, and subscribe with your name and email plus a note requesting only that content.

expected_values.message_text: Please send me only wedding DJ and Latin dance content.

tasks.instruction: Using the private lessons calendar, choose the first Saturday within the next 30 days that has an available studio slot between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM, book a 60-minute lesson at the studio, and submit the request form.

lesson_request_form.name: Riley Chen
lesson_request_form.notes: Booking a 60-minute private lesson on Saturday between 10 AM and 2 PM at the studio.

tasks.instruction: On the online tutorials page, create a bundle of three tutorials—one hip-hop, one salsa, and one bachata—each rated at least 4 stars and priced under $20, then on the bundle summary choose the option to pay later at your first in-person lesson and confirm the request.

target_names: Salsa Basics On2 for Absolute Beginners
